authors: Karolin Soontjens Kathleen Beckers Emma van der Goot Sophie Morosoli
raw_title: Press and Prejudice: an Interview Study on Politicians’ Perceptions of Partisan News Media Bias
title_en: Press and Prejudice: an Interview Study on Politicians’ Perceptions of Partisan News Media Bias
title_zh: 新闻与偏见：关于政治家对党派新闻媒体偏见认知的访谈研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究通过访谈了解政治家如何看待新闻媒体中的党派偏见。
plain_summary_en: This study uses interviews to understand how politicians perceive partisan bias in news media.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的媒体偏见认知研究
research_direction_en: Perception of media bias in political communication
